text: Did you know butterflies undergo a dramatic reboot? From larva to adult, their transformation is nothing short of miraculous. First, the caterpillar munches leaves, storing energy for the next phase. Then, it forms a chrysalis, entering a state of transformation. Inside, its body dissolves, cells reconfiguring into a butterfly. This process can take weeks, but the result? Stunning. Curious about more science wonders? Like and follow for more!
